content.text:
[cron:3abaaed2-b403-4284-81a2-553c957fa78d 23点记忆夜跑：读当天日志→提炼→写规则候选→清理低价值内容] 在 /Users/ling/.openclaw/workspace 内执行每天23点的记忆夜跑。要求：1）运行 python3 scripts/nightly_memory_distill.py；2）确认产出 memory/nightly_distill/YYYY-MM-DD.md、memory/nightly_rules/YYYY-MM-DD.md、memory/nightly_memory_job_state.json；3）不要调用 message 工具；直接输出一段中文摘要，包含：状态、今日日志文件、产出文件、规则候选数、清理条数；4）若失败，明确写出阻断原因并返回同样结构的摘要。
Current time: Wednesday, April 22nd, 2026 - 11:00 PM (Asia/Shanghai) / 2026-04-22 15:00 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.
